targets.text: 嘩，好靚呀！原來少爺識寫自己個名喎。

guides.text: 好棒！原來少爺會寫自己的名字

targets.text: 好字呀！龍飛鳳舞，蘇擦蝦耳鏟
而家唔係啦，我個仔，你佢孫，阿燦呢？
少爺，你真係要好啲學寫字
我傻，擦呀擦，我睇表起佢好。
師爺，你攞佢，有咁多眼掛咁多眼。
你揹住佢參夫阿國，和友鄰皆威下先。
見你咁生性，我都好安慰
你聽我講，爹呢，書名係二世祖。
庫身家都洗到七七八八㗎喇
好話唔好聽，但係爹兩個嘢硬呢。
你真係全部都靠自己喇。
成十萬兩一張，省得洗呀
茂利，攞我頂西洋帽過嚟。
廿五歲大壽嘛，早啲到呀。
擺大壽你都梳靚啲個頭啦
你咁乞兒會咁有錢？我都想做。
個衰仔擺大壽，打張簽都嫁細個人嘅。
但係老爺擺大壽呢，要嫁細個佢，你老…

guides.text: 好字！龍飛鳳舞，蘇察哈爾燦
好小子，但是別驕傲，知道嗎？
現在可不同，我的兒子你的孫兒阿燦
少爺，你真是要好好地學習寫字
師爺，把它掛在最當眼的地方
你先揹著它簪花掛紅，遊行威風一下
你這麼爭氣，我也很安慰
你聽我說，爹是有名的敗家兒
家裡的財產也敗得差不多
說難聽一點，日後我兩腳一伸
你個王八蛋，怎麼到這裡來討飯？
十萬兩一張，省一點花啊
茂利，把我的西洋帽拿來
做大壽你也得先把頭髮梳整齊
乞丐會那麼有錢？我也想當
那臭小子的壽帖真威風
他日老爺做大壽，要比他威風

revisions.text: 好字呀！龍飛鳳舞，蘇察哈爾燦
revisions.note: The name is consistently written as 蘇察哈爾燦, not the phonetically garbled form.
Corrects the reversed name to 燦爾哈察蘇.

revisions.text: 叻仔，但係唔好驕傲，知咩？
revisions.note: “事無驕” is a transcription error; the intended phrase is “但係唔好驕傲.”
Corrects the family name to 蘇察哈爾.

revisions.text: 幾代都冇幾個曉寫字嘅
revisions.note: “我” is incorrect here; the sentence means that only a few people in the family have been able to write.

revisions.text: 而家唔同喇，我個仔，你個孫，阿燦
revisions.note: Corrects several garbled words and restores the reference to A Can as the listener’s grandson.
“趴朝” is a mishearing of 他朝.
“趴日” and “有病” are transcription errors; the line refers to having a son with a name in the future.
The opening words and “睇表起” are garbled; the intended line asks A Can to have it framed.
Corrects “表” to the Cantonese verb 裱.

revisions.text: 師爺，攞佢掛喺最當眼嘅地方
revisions.note: Restores the phrase meaning to hang it in the most conspicuous place.

revisions.text: 你揹住佢簪花掛紅，遊行威風下先
revisions.note: Corrects the heavily garbled wording describing carrying it with ceremonial decorations and parading proudly.
“擦呀擦” is a mishearing of the name 阿燦.

revisions.text: 你聽我講，爹係有名嘅敗家仔
revisions.note: Corrects the phrase to “my father is a famous spendthrift.”

revisions.text: 屋企身家都洗到七七八八㗎喇
revisions.note: “庫身家” is a transcription error for 屋企身家.

revisions.text: 講句唔好聽嘅，但係爹兩腳一伸呢
revisions.note: Restores the idiom meaning “if I die,” which was misheard as “two things are hard.”

revisions.text: 你個王八蛋，點解嚟到呢度討飯？
revisions.note: The existing line is unrelated to the reference dialogue and is completely mistranscribed.
“我不留” is a mishearing of 向來我都.

revisions.text: 成十萬兩一張，慳啲使呀
revisions.note: Corrects the wording and the character used for “spend” from 洗 to 使.
The source says 今晚, meaning tonight, rather than 今日.
“跪跟” is a mishearing of 貴庚呀.

revisions.text: 乞兒會咁有錢？我都想做。
revisions.note: Corrects the phrase to the Cantonese expression for “a beggar.”
“瘦頭” is a mishearing of 壽頭.
The source repeats 過嚟 twice, which is missing from the current transcription.
Corrects the garbled wording to refer to the young man’s impressive birthday invitation.

revisions.text: 他日老爺擺大壽，要威過佢
revisions.note: Restores the intended comparison: the old master’s future birthday celebration should outdo his.

targets.text: 我家善人、貧病老陽，死人塌樓。
師兄，我點人錢打錯了，死乞丐！
打你個混蛋，又不嫁黑色黑道來這裡？
吃飯、看你少爺直落叫雞，我包
你耳頂沒有，像麻大孝那樣。
今次趙先生幫本官蘇平長毛賊
今次有六王爺，在皇上面前。

guides.text: 打賞個救命錢　　怎麼搞的，死乞丐！
你個王八蛋，怎麼到這裏來討飯？
吃飯看戲宵夜嫖妓，我包
大爺進我間房吧⋯　　請你跟我來
你真壞，有名字你不叫，叫我鴇母
你的帽子像披麻帶孝似的
趙先生這趟幫本官掃平長毛賊
那就有勞皇爺在皇上面前

revisions.note: The repeated call for a tip was omitted from the Cantonese subtitle.
The transcription misheard the phrase describing the speaker's family ruin and poverty.
The subtitle contains incorrect wording; it should state that there are no relatives and the family is separated.

revisions.text: 打賞個救命錢，點搞㗎，死乞丐！
revisions.note: The line was substantially misheard; it should refer to giving a life-saving tip and asking what happened.

revisions.text: 你個王八蛋，點解嚟呢度討飯？
revisions.note: The transcription misheard the insult and the question about coming here to beg.
The question was misheard; the intended meaning is asking whether this also counts as a tip.
The Cantonese copula should be written as「係」, and the line means that beggars are people too.
The line was misheard; it means anyone with money can come here.
The verb「嚟」was omitted from the transcription.

revisions.text: 食飯、睇戲、宵夜、嫖妓，我包
revisions.note: Several items in the list were misheard; the line refers to eating, watching performances, having late-night food, and visiting prostitutes.
The question was misheard; it means asking whether the speaker cannot pay for it.
The response was misheard; it should be an affirmative reply.

revisions.text: 大爺入我間房啦⋯請你跟我嚟
revisions.note: The line was misheard and should invite the gentleman into the room and ask him to follow.
The name/title was misheard as「喂」.
The term of address was misheard as「龜婆」; it should be「鴇母」.

revisions.text: 你好衰，有名你唔叫，叫我鴇母。
revisions.note: The line was substantially misheard; it says that she is bad for calling herself by the title「鴇母」despite having a name.
The wording was misheard; the line says that speaking this way makes everyone happy.

revisions.text: 趙先生呢趟幫本官掃平長毛賊
revisions.note: The transcription misheard「掃平」as「蘇平」and omitted「趟」.
The final word was misheard; the phrase is「重重有賞」.

revisions.text: 咁就有勞王爺喺皇上面前
revisions.note: 「六王爺」is a mishearing; the line refers to asking the prince to speak before the emperor.
The transcription omitted the phrase「好說話」.
「大喜」was a transcription error for「大戲」.

targets.text: 蘇翁，今天你好日子，開心死你了？
我們有幾位新姑娘，包你滿意
少爺，什麼金魚還是木魚？
幾個木魚，還不過來招呼客人⋯
你想要什麼女人，你開聲就行了。
無所謂，女人個個都一樣。

guides.text: 蘇翁，今天是你的好日子，很高興吧
我們有幾位新來的姑娘，保證你滿意
你們還不過來待候客人⋯
蘇翁，今天是你的大日子
你想要怎樣的女人，你說就成

revisions.text: 蘇翁，今日係你好日子，開心死你了？
revisions.note: The phrase 「今天你好日子」 is missing the copula 「係」; the intended meaning is that today is the speaker’s good day.
「搏」 is incorrect in this context; the intended verb is 「摸」, matching the meaning of touching the ‘wooden fish’.
「自大」 is a miswriting; 「至大」 means that Su Weng is the most important person today, matching the Chinese subtitle.
The line contradicts the meaning of 「沒甚麼特別」; it should say 「冇乜特別」.

targets.text: 誰這麼大膽挑你？讓我掌他的嘴。
有惑，還帶有殺氣。這隻眼神我沒見過。
這位如霜姑娘你客串的
不知道，趙大人有沒有興趣和他拜訪呢？
大格自己人，又何必客氣呢？
如霜呀，快點下來見下趙大人啦。
小女子如霜，拜見趙大人

guides.text: 誰膽敢挑你？讓我打她的咀
誘惑中帶有煞氣，這種眼神我沒見過
趙大人有沒有興趣和她擺房？
大家自己人，何必客氣呢？
如霜，快點下來見趙大人
小女子如霜，拜見趙大人

revisions.note: The name is mistranscribed; it should match 「蘇翁」 in the Chinese subtitle.

revisions.text: 誘惑中帶有殺氣，呢種眼神我冇見過。
revisions.note: 「有惑」 is missing the first character of 「誘惑」, and 「這隻眼神」 should be 「呢種眼神」.

revisions.text: 呢位如霜姑娘係客串嘅
revisions.note: 「你客串的」 is a transcription error; the intended meaning is that Miss Rushuang is a guest performer.

revisions.text: 唔知趙大人有冇興趣同佢擺房呢？
revisions.note: 「拜訪」 is a homophone error; the intended phrase is 「擺房」, and the person referred to is her.
The title should be 「皇爺」, consistent with the Chinese subtitle and the following line.
The title should be 「皇爺」 rather than 「王爺」, consistent with the surrounding dialogue.

revisions.text: 大家自己人，又何必客氣呢？
revisions.note: 「大格」 is a clear transcription error for 「大家」.
「拜訪」 is a homophone error; this line should repeat 「擺房」 from the previous subtitle.
The line is mistranscribed. It should address the older sister and identify the man as him.
「曬爹」 is a clear transcription error for 「殺阿爹」, and the pronoun should be 「佢」.
「但」 does not match the spoken content or the Chinese subtitle; the intended line is a farewell to Zhao.

targets.text: 如霜姑娘今晚要陪我們少爺
讓我來……讓我講講你們公道的話。
只要你們誰出得多過十萬兩銀票
千萬不要傷了和氣，聽聽…
我有粒朝廷大內的定封珠，無價的。

guides.text: 如霜姑娘今晚要陪我家少爺
讓我來⋯讓我說句公道話
只要你們誰能付超過十萬兩銀票
千萬不要傷和氣，對不對？
我有一顆朝廷大內的定風珠，無價寶

revisions.note: The phrase contains clear transcription errors: 「擺房不有空」 should be 「都冇空」, matching the meaning that she has no time to receive him.

revisions.text: 讓我來……讓我講句公道嘅話。
revisions.note: 「講講你們公道的話」 is a mistranscription of the idiomatic phrase 「講句公道嘅話」.

revisions.text: 我有粒朝廷大內嘅定風珠，無價嘅。
revisions.note: 「定封珠」 is a character error; the object is 「定風珠」, as reflected in the Chinese subtitle.

targets.text: 趙大人呀，我返房等你喇，喂。
呢粒珠淨唔淨十萬兩呀？
十萬兩銀通，姑娘，你都重嚴少？
我一樣鍾意銀兩，不過唔鍾意你啫嘛。

guides.text: 十萬兩你還嫌少嗎，姑娘？
我也喜歡銀兩，只是不喜歡你

revisions.text: 呢粒珠值唔值十萬兩呀？
revisions.note: 「淨唔淨」應為「值唔值」，意思係詢問呢粒珠係咪值十萬兩。

revisions.text: 十萬兩銀兩，姑娘，你都仲嫌少？
revisions.note: 「銀通」應為「銀兩」；「重嚴少」應為「仲嫌少」，與中文字幕及語境一致。

targets.text: 夠坦白，我真係喜歡佢非常。
一定係我今日頂帽唔多襯嘅髮型
如雙姑娘睇我唔上眼，係我抵死咋。
你放心呀，我哋做好多好靚好省嘅姑娘㗎。
龜婆，咁今晚我就靠晒你喇。

guides.text: 夠坦白，我真的非常喜歡
一定是我今天的帽子和髮型不配
如霜姑娘看不上我，是我該死
放心，我還有很多很漂亮的姑娘
鴇母，那今晚就倚仗你了

revisions.text: 夠坦白，我真係非常喜歡佢。
revisions.note: The word order is incorrect in Cantonese; it should be “非常喜歡佢”.
“騷擁” is a clear transcription error; the name should be “蘇翁”.

revisions.text: 如霜姑娘睇我唔上眼，係我抵死咋。
revisions.note: The character name conflicts with the Chinese subtitle and should be “如霜姑娘”.

revisions.text: 你放心呀，我哋有好多好靚好省嘅姑娘㗎。
revisions.note: “做好多” is a clear transcription error in this context; it should be “有好多”.

revisions.text: 鴇母，咁今晚我就靠晒你喇。
revisions.note: “龜婆” does not correspond to the reference term “鴇母”; the correct Cantonese term is “鴇母”.
The subtitle is incomplete and does not match the intended meaning. It should express “這與我無關” followed by the rebuke “放肆”.

revisions.text: 皇爺，你覺得廣東嘅大戲點？
revisions.note: 「王爺」同參考字幕嘅稱呼唔一致，應為「皇爺」。
The phrase「周鶴」appears to be a mis-transcription of「奏樂」, consistent with the Chinese subtitle indicating music being played.

targets.text: 邊個獸頭欺我仔，我蛋邊個。
又幾銀性㗎？佢夠唔夠資格呀？
人家送咗咁厚禮，唔好再欺佢啦。
拿去打相，畀啲佢啲貓來……老爺。
個頁牌上面寫住「鐵帽子王爭格林森呀」，嗨。

guides.text: 誰敢欺負我的兒子，我就射誰
不用害怕，阿燦，誰欺負你？
他有多少家財？他夠不夠資格
人家送那麼厚的禮就不要再欺負他
來⋯拿去打賞給這裡的姑娘　　老爺
令牌上寫著「鐵帽子王僧格林參」

revisions.note: “黃州” is a transcription error; the dialogue says “廣州將軍到,” matching the Chinese subtitle.
The line should be “走開,” not “呀,” according to the corresponding dialogue.

revisions.text: 邊個敢欺我仔，我射邊個。
revisions.note: “獸頭” and “蛋” are clear mishearings. The intended wording is “敢” and “射,” meaning whoever dares bully his son will be shot.

revisions.text: 唔使驚呀，阿燦，邊個欺你？
revisions.note: The child’s name “阿燦” is missing, and “誰” should be the Cantonese “邊個.”
“死” is a transcription error for an exclamation meaning “what,” and the line should refer to bullying him.

revisions.text: 佢有幾多身家㗎？佢夠唔夠資格呀？
revisions.note: “銀性” is not the intended wording. The line asks about the person’s wealth and qualification.
The line refers to giving a congratulatory gift, so “送我禮” is missing “賀.”

revisions.text: 攞去打賞，畀啲呢度啲姑娘……老爺。
revisions.note: Several words are mistranscribed: “打相” should be “打賞,” and the reference is to the girls here, not “佢啲貓.”

revisions.text: 個令牌上面寫住「鐵帽子王僧格林沁」
revisions.note: “頁牌” should be “令牌,” and the name is “僧格林沁,” not “爭格林森.”

targets.text: 身為朝廷命官，不得嫖妓
當然要來抓你這種害群之馬
今天是現清太祖皇后葉克拿拉氏的忌辰。

guides.text: 身為朝廷命官，不得嫖妓
當然要來拉你這害羣之馬
今天是清太祖皇后葉赫拿拉氏的忌辰

revisions.note: “王爺” conflicts with the reference dialogue’s “皇爺”; this appears to be a mishearing.
“搶他” is inconsistent with the intended command to arrest and lock him up; it should be “鎖他”.
The verb “抓” is inconsistent with the dialogue’s intended Cantonese wording for arresting someone, which is “拉”.
The arresting verb should be “拉” rather than “抓”, matching the surrounding dialogue and reference subtitle.

revisions.text: 當然要來拉你這種害群之馬
revisions.note: The arresting verb should be “拉” rather than “抓”, matching the reference dialogue.

revisions.text: 今天是清太祖皇后葉赫那拉氏的忌辰。
revisions.note: “現清” is a transcription error; the phrase should be “清太祖”. The imperial clan name is also corrected to “葉赫那拉氏”.
“軍官最佳等” is a clear transcription error; the intended phrase is “京官罪加一等”.
The line is transcribed out of order; it should repeat “斬他”.

targets.text: 任何人不分辨，一樣要問斬
蘇張芬，帶你去你這麼開心的地方吧。
想不到在這裡，被無賴打擾你的雅興。
王爺…王爺！這個玩不起，見不收

guides.text: 任何人不束辮子也要問斬
蘇將軍，大家玩得那麼開心就算了吧
沒想到在這裡會讓他們打擾你的雅興
老爺！這個不能惹，見好就收

revisions.note: “律” is missing “例”; the standard reference is “大清律例”.

revisions.text: 任何人唔束辮子，一樣要問斬
revisions.note: “不分辨” is a mistranscription; the intended phrase is “不束辮子”.
The wording should convey “Then are you going to…”, rather than “Wouldn't you…”.
“多多都有” is a mistranscription of “再多都有”.
The subtitle omits the command “斬他”; it should be “斬佢”.
The line conflicts with the reference meaning; it should indicate that the game is over.

revisions.text: 蘇將軍，大家玩得咁開心就算喇
revisions.note: The name/title “蘇張芬” is incorrect, and the rest of the line is mistranscribed. It should refer to 蘇將軍 and say that everyone is enjoying themselves, so let it go.
“沒玩過” omits “還沒”, changing the meaning from “I still haven't played yet”.
The form of address is mistranscribed as “王爺”; the reference indicates “皇爺”.

revisions.text: 想不到在這裡，被他們打擾你的雅興。
revisions.note: “無賴” is inconsistent with the intended reference to the group, “他們”.
“不就” is a homophone error; the intended expression is “安排不周”.

revisions.text: 老爺！呢個唔可以惹，見好就收
revisions.note: The address and phrase are mistranscribed. It should be “老爺”, “不能惹”, and “見好就收”.
The original text is garbled; this line should be the concluding instruction to stop and collect.
“少” is a character error in the idiom; it should be “小”.

targets.text: 莫大叔呀，啲酒菜已經落到斷腸散喇。
好！照冒極，佢暗算我哋幫主
同埋太平天國幾個將領
你哋一陣見佢未上當，千萬唔好出手
因為我哋幾個加埋都未必係佢對手
我會盡量引佢埋床㗎喇

guides.text: 莫大叔，酒菜已經加了斷腸散
好！趙無極暗算我們幫主
和太平天國的幾名將領
他們的先天罡氣很厲害
你們待會見他沒上當，千萬別出手
因為湊合我們幾個也不是他的對手

revisions.text: 好！趙無極暗算我哋幫主
revisions.note: The character name is mistranscribed as 「冒極」; it should be 「趙無極」, matching the Chinese subtitle and the proper name in context.
The martial-arts term is 「先天罡氣」, not 「先天剛氣」.
「係呀」 does not match the intended meaning. The line indicates that someone has arrived, so it should be 「有人嚟」.

targets.text: 余霜姑娘，我們又見面了。
怎麼會是你？天余，趙大爺呢？
你們蘇媽頭髮像素靶一樣
沒但是，那十萬兩我已經帶進袋裡。
蘇姑娘⋯　掌握一下吧⋯

guides.text: 如霜姑娘，我們又見面了
給蘇翁一打就變成珍珠粉末
你不要看蘇翁的頭髮像掃帚
但是甚麼，十萬兩我已拿了

revisions.text: 如霜姑娘，我哋又見面喇。
revisions.note: The name is transcribed incorrectly; it should be 如霜, matching the Chinese subtitle and the character’s name.
“天余” is an apparent transcription error and is not present in the corresponding dialogue.
The line is garbled; it should refer to Zhao’s 定風珠.

revisions.text: 畀蘇翁一打，就變成珍珠粉末。
revisions.note: The wording contains multiple misrecognitions; the object is broken into pearl powder by 蘇翁.
“還” is an apparent extra or misheard word not supported by the corresponding dialogue.

revisions.text: 你唔好睇蘇翁啲頭髮似掃帚咁。
revisions.note: Several words are misheard; the line refers to 蘇翁’s hair looking like a broom.
The subject and wording are mistranscribed; it should mean that he is an interesting person.

revisions.text: 但是乜嘢？十萬兩我已經攞咗。
revisions.note: The sentence does not match the intended meaning; it should say that the ten thousand taels have already been taken.
The meaning is mistranscribed; the speaker says they will not return the money.
“蘇勇這份人” is a misrecognition of 蘇翁嘅為人.
“閨婆” is a transcription error; the correct form of address is 鴇母.
The first “吧” is incorrect; the intended line repeats 是的.
The name and wording are mistranscribed; it should address 七姑娘 and say 將就一下.

targets.text: 唔係，我根本就唔識武功呀。
我求你唔好再纏住我啦
余雙，從來冇人噉對我㗎。
我發覺我竟已愛上咗你

guides.text: 如霜，從來沒有人這樣對我
我發覺我已經愛上了你
絕對沒有！我決定要娶你

revisions.text: 如霜，從來冇人噉對我㗎。
revisions.note: The name conflicts with the corresponding Chinese subtitle, which identifies the character as 如霜 rather than 余雙.

targets.text: 我就當住你把寶劍發誓
我係真心要娶余霜姑娘為妻

我是真心要娶如霜姑娘為妻
若然有半句假話，天打雷劈

revisions.text: 我就對住你把寶劍發誓
revisions.note: “當住” does not match the meaning of “對著” here; it should be “對住”.

revisions.text: 我係真心要娶如霜姑娘為妻
revisions.note: The name conflicts with the Chinese subtitle, which identifies her as 如霜姑娘.
“等你興奮” is a transcription error; the intended meaning is “替你興奮”.
“億人之下” is an obvious character error; the idiom is “一人之下，萬人之上”.
“閉” is a transcription error; the intended Cantonese interjection meaning “糟糕” is “弊”.
The phrase “騎下仔女事” is malformed and conflicts with the reference meaning. It should be “騎呢仔礙事”, meaning that odd guy is causing trouble.

targets.text: 算啦！佢咪有心阻我哋嘅。

guides.text: 算吧！他不是有心阻礙我們

targets.text: 我點都唔會諗呢啲嘢㗎喇
莫大叔話唔識學能十八掌都打佢唔贏嘅

guides.text: 莫大叔說不會降龍十八掌便打不過他

revisions.note: “阻佢” is a transcription error; the intended phrase is “鍾意佢,” meaning “like him,” matching the Chinese subtitle.
“一係未死” is missing the character “日”; the established phrase is “一日未死,” meaning “as long as Zhao Wuji is not dead.”

revisions.text: 莫大叔話唔識降龍十八掌都打佢唔贏嘅
revisions.note: “學能十八掌” is a clear mis-transcription of “降龍十八掌,” the name of the martial-arts technique.
“假” is a homophone transcription error; in context the intended character is “嫁,” referring to getting married.
“發口” is a clear transcription error; the intended phrase is “發情,” matching the Chinese subtitle.

targets.text: 何方擁孽？夠膽出來欺騙本少爺！
呢鑊打你唔死，算你大命。
以後未化妝，唔好事為限呀，知咪？
係，你唔好等余霜姑娘喇，佢走咗喇⋯

guides.text: 胸部那麼平，你的奶子呢？
這次沒有把你打死，算是你走運
以後沒有化妝不要四處走，知道嗎？
你不用等如霜姑娘了，她已經走了⋯

revisions.text: 何方妖孽？夠膽出嚟嚇本少爺！
revisions.note: “擁孽”應為“妖孽”；另外“欺騙”同中文字幕嘅“嚇”意思不符，應修正為“嚇”。
人物稱呼“素勇”應為“蘇翁”，而“閨婆”係“鴇母”嘅誤寫。
承接上一句，人物稱呼應統一為“鴇母”。
“咁”應為“咁早”，而“未起身”同中文字幕嘅“未睡醒”不符，應修正為“未瞓醒”。

revisions.text: 以後唔化妝，唔好四圍行呀，知唔知？
revisions.note: “事為限”係明顯轉寫錯誤，應為“事圍行”／“四圍行”；“知咪”亦應為“知唔知”。

revisions.text: 係，你唔好等如霜姑娘喇，佢走咗喇⋯
revisions.note: 人物姓名應與中文字幕一致，由“余霜”修正為“如霜”。

皇上，趙先生一身奇技異術

Corrects the garbled line to “阿爹欽佩你”.
The counting line is missing 四 and 五 and should continue through 六.
Corrects the garbled reply corresponding to “來了，老爺”.

revisions.text: 少爺上京赴考，我哋搬家。

revisions.note: Corrects the garbled threat about damaging the speaker's things.

The line means to leave a piece of clothing for the speaker to wear.

revisions.text: 小心呀！細路仔怕乜嘢呢？
revisions.note: Corrects the first phrase and restores “細路仔” for “小孩子”.
Corrects the comparison question to “Am I bigger than you?”
Corrects the miswritten character “木” to “我”.
Corrects the garbled line about eventually becoming bigger than the other person.

revisions.text: 你哋企晒喺度做乜嘢？仲唔搬佢走，咁？

revisions.text: 間屋咁大，幾時先搬得完呀？
revisions.note: Corrects the garbled wording about how long it will take to finish moving such a large house.
Corrects “好聲” to the intended caution while pushing.
Corrects the garbled direction to push the item over there.

revisions.text: 小心啲⋯小心我啲荔枝呀
revisions.note: Corrects the garbled warning about the lychees.
Corrects the misheard warning and insult.
Corrects “尾臣” to the standard court expression “微臣”.

revisions.text: 喺廣西剿平長毛餘孽，立功不少
revisions.note: Corrects “餘葉” to “餘孽”.

revisions.text: 微臣特意帶佢嚟見皇上
revisions.note: Corrects “尾臣” to “微臣”.

revisions.text: 好！朕而家賜你為都察院副左都御史。
revisions.note: Corrects the completely garbled official title to 都察院副左都御史.
The phrase "眼睛小敗" is an apparent mishearing/mistranscription of "大驚小怪," matching the Chinese reference and the idiomatic expression.
"去" conflicts with the corresponding reply meaning "是"; it should be "係" in Cantonese.

targets.text: 如果呢個女仔係真嘅就

guides.text: 如果這個女人是真的就好了

revisions.note: “未神” is a transcription error; the correct term is “微臣,” meaning “this humble minister.”

revisions.text: 如果呢個女仔係真嘅就好喇
revisions.note: The Cantonese subtitle is incomplete; it should end with “好喇,” matching the meaning “it would be great.”
“可惡” does not match the reference meaning. The line should be “企好！快啲,” meaning “Stand properly! Hurry up.”
“入去” does not match the reference meaning “What is it? What is it?”
The opening word is mistranscribed; “嚟” matches “來,” while “入去” matches “進去.”
The Cantonese subtitle repeats the following line and does not match the reference meaning “甚麼事？”.
“進去吧” omits the meaning of hiding in the reference subtitle; “匿入去” accurately conveys “躲進去”.

revisions.note: “你好靚” conflicts with the reference meaning “少爺你很棒”; the likely transcription is “你好叻”.
“快啲” does not match the meaning “靠攏一點”; this should be “埋啲”.

revisions.text: 啊，你好衰㗎，咁咪話你囉。
revisions.note: “咁咪話你咗” is an incorrect transcription of the Cantonese expression meaning “這樣說人家”; the final particle should be “囉”.
The reference indicates “你是大嘛”; the character “大” is missing from the Cantonese transcription.

revisions.text: 吓，嗯，大肚婆都有？呃我唔到嘅。
revisions.note: “下陣” is an apparent mishearing; the interjection should be “吓”.

revisions.text: 阿爹仲諗整蠱嚟添，好嘢好嘢好嘢。
revisions.note: “整菇” is a misspelling of “整蠱”, meaning to play a prank or tease someone.

revisions.text: 好嘞，好嘞，少爺聽朝考試。
revisions.note: “聽知” is a transcription error for “聽朝”, meaning tomorrow morning.

revisions.text: 預備咩未？贏梗嘅話，乜你唔知咩？
revisions.note: “贏講” is a mishearing; the intended Cantonese is “贏梗”, meaning certain to win.
“做法” conflicts with the reference meaning “造化”; the correct word is “造化”.
“只依殺” is garbled. The intended phrase meaning “全靠他自己” is “只依靠佢自己”.

revisions.text: 我仔十八般武藝，樣樣皆精。
revisions.note: “見見皆精” is a transcription error; the standard phrase here is “樣樣皆精”.

revisions.text: 喂，呢二百萬兩係咪可以酌量減啲啊？哎。
revisions.note: “著量” is a mishearing of “酌量”, and the pronoun should be “呢” for “that two million taels”.

targets.text: 一於步個硬行陣，馬隊纏住中風營

revisions.text: 一於佈個雁行陣，馬隊前駐中鋒營
revisions.note: Corrected apparent transcription errors: 「硬行陣」 to 「雁行陣」, 「纏住」 to 「前駐」, and 「中風營」 to 「中鋒營」, consistent with the Chinese reference.
「攻隊」 is a transcription error for 「弓隊」, and 「墊後」 should be 「殿後」.

The original text contains clear transcription errors and does not match the intended meaning. Corrected it to indicate the preliminary examination for the martial arts champion and the candidates entering the venue.
“劉力”應為“留力”，與中文字幕「留力而已」一致。
“冇錢”應為“冇恥”，“指你”應為粗口用語“屌你”，而“老母”亦與中文字幕「你娘」對應。

Corrects the garbled transcription to the phrase meaning that he kept his head down along the way.

revisions.text: 但係老實講，入到決賽都係好嘅
revisions.note: Corrects the garbled phrase to 「但係老實講，入到決賽都係好嘅」.

revisions.text: 八十萬兩咁少？買夠二百萬兩噉
revisions.note: Corrects 「賣夠」 to 「買夠」, meaning to bet up to two million taels.
Corrects the garbled transcription of 「給你說說」.

revisions.text: 我覺得蘇燦好似贏緊噉嘅
revisions.note: Corrects the abbreviated contestant name from 「蘇刷」 to 「蘇燦」.
Adds 「第二次」, which is necessary for the meaning of making a second all-in bet.
Corrects 「落住」 to 「下注」.

revisions.text: 咦，我落注嚟做乜嘢啫？嗰個我仔嚟噉啊。
revisions.note: Corrects 「落住」 to 「落注」.
Corrects the garbled phrase to 「我少睇咗一樣添」.
Corrects the garbled question to 「少分析咗乜嘢啊？」.
Corrects the garbled response to indicate that the bloodline was overlooked.
Completes the announcement as 「主考到」.
Corrects the examiner's name from 「老井」 to 「老鄭」.

targets.text: 要嘗，佢係博達爾多嘅阿蘇嚟嘎嘛？係，啊啊。

revisions.note: The name is mistranscribed as 「增價淋衫」; it should be 「僧格林沁」, matching the Chinese subtitle.

revisions.text: 你睇，佢係博達爾多嘅阿叔嚟㗎嘛？係，啊啊。
revisions.note: 「要嘗」 is an evident transcription error in context and 「阿蘇」 should be 「阿叔」, matching the meaning that he is Bodaerduo's uncle.

targets.text: 嘩！把都射住埋，最少都揀到兩分呀！

guides.text: 靶都射穿了！至少都多加兩分
蘇燦靶上沒有箭！博達爾多勝

revisions.text: 嘩！靶都射住埋，最少都攞到兩分呀！
revisions.note: “把” is a transcription error for “靶”, and “揀到” should be “攞到” in the sense of obtaining two points.
“照介係嘅” is a mis-transcription; the intended Cantonese expression is “照計係嘅”, meaning “as expected/in principle, yes.”

revisions.text: 蘇燦靶上冇箭！博達爾多勝
revisions.note: The names and target reference are mis-transcribed. “鬚襯把上冇箭！畢多勝” should be “蘇燦靶上冇箭！博達爾多勝”, matching the Chinese reference.

guides.text: 有沒有搞錯！你老祖！要把戲？

targets.text: 考生上馬！準備下一回合，哼！

guides.text: 考生上馬！準備下一回合

revisions.note: The form of address appears to be mistranscribed. It should be “趙先生,” consistent with the corresponding Chinese subtitle, rather than “教師先生.”
The phrase should be 「追返局」, meaning to catch up by one round; 「吹返谷」 is a transcription error.
The transcription is garbled. Based on the Chinese reference, it should ask whether the other person has torn up their ticket yet.
The original wording is garbled and does not match the reply meaning “no.”
The original contains Japanese text and an apparent misrecognition of the Cantonese phrase. Corrected it to the natural Cantonese transcription meaning “Are you kidding?”
“復書” is a miswritten term; the intended phrase matching “還不認輸” is “服輸.”

targets.text: 又頭再打個羊，你單手單腳。
廢時話我欺下你呀，哈哈哈哈

guides.text: 重新開始，讓你一手一腳

revisions.text: 由頭再打過，畀你一手一腳。
revisions.note: Corrected apparent misrecognitions: 「又頭」to「由頭」, 「打個羊」to「打過」, and added the omitted 「畀」 while using the natural wording 「一手一腳」.

revisions.text: 費事話我欺負你呀，哈哈哈哈
revisions.note: Corrected 「廢時」to「費事」 and 「欺下」to「欺負」 to match the intended meaning of not wanting to be accused of bullying the other person.

targets.text: 嗰度就梗用個pack嘅啦，仲有第二次咩？係咪？
黎尚武嗰名唔准用鴨氣
你先跌落地，呢個回合判莫達以多勝。吓？

guides.text: 你用這骯髒的手段來取得勝利？
這當然要用臀啦！還有別處可用嗎？
例上沒有說明不準用暗器
你先掉下來，這個回合判博達爾多勝

revisions.note: The phrase appears to be a mistranscription of the Cantonese expression meaning a dirty or lousy move; 「渣招」 fits the context better than 「嗱咋招」.

revisions.text: 嗰度就梗用個pat嘅啦，仲有第二次咩？係咪？
revisions.note: 「pack」 appears to be a mishearing of the Cantonese pronunciation of the English word “pat,” referring to the buttocks in this context.
「鴨氣」 is a clear transcription error for 「暗器」, meaning a concealed weapon.

revisions.text: 你先跌落地，呢個回合判博達爾多勝。吓？
revisions.note: The winner’s name is mistranscribed. It should match the Chinese name 「博達爾多」 rather than 「莫達以多」.

targets.text: 你家唔家賊老隻啊，逼我窮殘放我治療啊！
你以後唔會畀我見到你
唔使啦！你以後都見唔到佢啊。
博大已多三局兩勝，係金科冇狀元。

guides.text: 你個短命的老鄭，竟敢騙我
不用了！你以後都不會見到他
博達爾多三局兩勝，是今科武狀元

revisions.text: 你個短命老鄭啊，竟敢呃我！
revisions.note: The Cantonese transcription is severely garbled. Based on the Chinese subtitle, the intended wording is an insult to 老鄭 followed by accusing him of cheating.

revisions.text: 博達爾多三局兩勝，係今科武狀元。
revisions.note: The name appears to have been misheard as「博大已多」, and「係金科冇狀元」contradicts the reference meaning「是今科武狀元」. The corrected line restores the name and title.
The transcription omits the clear meaning that the speaker won and that the speaker is protesting. This revision matches the reference subtitle.

targets.text: 指標有毒都係佢自己嘅啫
家陣佢死咗，我仔咪做緊狀元？

guides.text: 這枝有毒的鏢是他自己的
他死了，我兒子就當狀元？
那我現在不是發財了嗎？

revisions.note: “指標” is a transcription error; the Chinese subtitle indicates “鏢” (dart), not “指標” (indicator).

revisions.text: 鏢有毒都係佢自己嘅啫
revisions.note: “指標” is a transcription error; it should be “鏢” (dart) to match the surrounding context.
“我個法” is an obvious transcription error. Based on the Chinese subtitle and context, it should be “我咪發咗？” meaning “haven’t I struck it rich?”

targets.text: 武藏元，武藏元，我想問你幾句，作為朝廷紀錄。
今次你成功！你最想多謝邊個呢？
余襄姑娘！會唔會係佢阿媽呢？係咯。

guides.text: 武狀元，我想問你幾句作為朝廷紀錄
你這次成功！會先感謝誰？
如霜姑娘！會不會是他的娘？

revisions.text: 武狀元，武狀元，我想問你幾句，作為朝廷紀錄。
revisions.note: “武藏元” is a transcription error; the correct title is “武狀元,” matching the Chinese subtitle.
The character’s name should be “如霜姑娘,” consistent with the Chinese subtitle and the following line.

revisions.text: 如霜姑娘！會唔會係佢阿媽呢？係咯。
revisions.note: The character’s name should be “如霜姑娘,” consistent with the preceding line and the Chinese subtitle.

targets.text: 曾家臨心，金方武藏員是誰？
稟告皇上，是廣東的蘇刷哈爾燦
微臣查到蘇刷哈爾燦是不識字的
怎可以答到考戰略的題目呢？

guides.text: 僧格林沁，今科武狀元是誰？
稟告皇上，是廣東的蘇察哈爾燦
微臣查出蘇察哈爾燦目不識丁
怎可以答到考戰略的題目呢？

revisions.text: 僧格林沁，今科武狀元是誰？
revisions.note: The name 「曾家臨心」 is a mis-transcription of 「僧格林沁」, and 「金方武藏員」 should be 「今科武狀元」.

revisions.text: 稟告皇上，是廣東的蘇察哈爾燦
revisions.note: The name 「蘇刷哈爾燦」 is a mis-transcription of 「蘇察哈爾燦」.
The name 「蘇刷哈爾燦」 is a mis-transcription of 「蘇察哈爾燦」.

targets.text: 蘇賊下意殘，你即刻寫自己個名出嚟
好彩！好彩！淨係寫個名啫。

guides.text: 蘇察哈爾燦，馬上寫出你的名字來

revisions.text: 蘇察哈爾燦，你即刻寫自己個名出嚟
revisions.note: The person's name is mistranscribed; it should match 「蘇察哈爾燦」.
「寫名佢得」 is an obvious transcription error and should be 「識寫個名」, meaning he knows how to write his name.

targets.text: 其實我連自己嘅名都唔識寫
咁就斬我呢？唔係啦，斬我！
斬我呢，斬我呢，皇上！我好斬啲嘢。
渾腸！你話斬邊個就斬邊個咩？
你唔會上書，快啲出嚟！出嚟呀

guides.text: 其實我連自己名字都不會寫
斬我吧　　皇上！你還是斬我吧
混帳！你們說要斬誰就斬誰嗎
吏部尚書，快點出來！出來

revisions.note: The phrase 「拿去斬」does not match the reference meaning “拉他出去斬”; the omitted wording should be restored.

revisions.text: 斬我呢，斬我呢，皇上！你都係斬我啦。
revisions.note: The final phrase is clearly mistranscribed and should match the repeated appeal to be executed: “你還是斬我吧”。

revisions.text: 混帳！你話斬邊個就斬邊個咩？
revisions.note: 「渾腸」is a transcription error for the exclamation 「混帳」。
This line is garbled. It should identify the official as 「吏部尚書」and state that the sentence is imposed according to precedent.

revisions.text: 吏部尚書，快啲出嚟！出嚟呀
revisions.note: 「你唔會上書」is a clear misrecognition of the repeated title 「吏部尚書」；the rest should mean “come out quickly”。

targets.text: 蘇察哈爾產兩父子罪犯欺君，理應問斬。吓？

但係貪贓而來充公，枉法喇喎⋯
冇呀，冇呀！我七年冇返個軍刑㗎喇。
冇執法，即係冇枉法㗎喎。
皇上，依例係最多判抄家咋喎

guides.text: 蘇察哈爾燦兩父子罪犯欺君理應問斬
念在你是功臣之後！可免一死
但貪贓依例充公，枉法嗎⋯
沒有！我七年都沒有到過軍營
沒有執法即是沒有枉法
皇上，依例最多判抄家的罪

revisions.note: The title should be 「吏部尚書」, matching the Chinese subtitle; 「你部尚書」 is a transcription error.

revisions.text: 蘇察哈爾燦兩父子罪犯欺君，理應問斬。吓？
revisions.note: The person's name is 「蘇察哈爾燦」, not 「蘇察哈爾產」.

revisions.text: 念在你係功臣之後！可免一死
revisions.note: 「功臣之孝」 is a mis-transcription; the intended phrase is 「功臣之後」, and the context indicates 「念在你係」.

revisions.text: 但係貪贓依例充公，枉法喇喎⋯
revisions.note: 「而來」 is inconsistent with the reference and should be 「依例」.

revisions.text: 冇呀，冇呀！我七年冇返過軍營㗎喇。
revisions.note: 「軍刑」 is a transcription error for 「軍營」, matching the meaning of having not been to the military camp.

targets.text: 全部依足晒基本法例辦事
噉，我而家交到你刑罰，得唔得呀？
哦，皇上出道聲嘅，要加碼嘅就得啦。
好！我而家就判你兩父子一世行黑。
點解個作弊你都查唔出㗎
趙無極，你揭發有功！就會好好上嚟。
嗰個，我爹神豬扒嚟喎，都要抄呀，喂。
亮易結都不得易解，苦相⋯
我諗你要認真啲可寫字。

guides.text: 全都是依足基本法例辦事
那朕現在多加刑罰行不行？
皇上說要加，當然沒問題
好！那朕就判你們兩父子一輩子討飯
為甚麼他作弊你沒有查出來
趙無極，你揭發有功！朕會好好賞你
這是我爹的神主牌位，你也要沒收
這個香爐鍋，你拿了也沒用
我想你要認真地學寫字了

revisions.text: 噉，我而家加多啲刑罰，得唔得呀？
revisions.note: The phrase corresponding to “add more punishment” was mistranscribed as “交到你刑罰.”

revisions.text: 哦，皇上出到聲嘅，要加碼嘅就得啦。
revisions.note: “出道聲” is a transcription error; it should be “出到聲.”

revisions.text: 好！我而家就判你兩父子一世行乞。
revisions.note: “行黑” is incorrect here; the intended phrase is “行乞,” meaning to beg for a living.
The historical name was mistranscribed. The standard written form is 僧格林沁.

revisions.text: 點解佢作弊你都查唔出㗎
revisions.note: “個作弊” should be “佢作弊,” matching the meaning that he cheated.
The sentence should express that it was fortunate to have 趙無極, rather than saying “no mistake.”

revisions.text: 趙無極，你揭發有功！就會好好賞你。
revisions.note: “上嚟” is a mishearing of “賞你,” meaning to reward you.
The opening phrase was substantially mistranscribed; it should be “身如柳絮.”

revisions.text: 嗰個，我爹嘅神主牌嚟喎，都要抄呀，喂。
revisions.note: “神豬扒” is a clear transcription error for “神主牌.”

revisions.text: 呢個香爐鍋嚟喎，冇用㗎。
revisions.note: “個餅” is incorrect; the object is a 香爐鍋, as indicated by the reference subtitle.
The poetic phrase was mistranscribed and should read “歷劫滄桑.”
Several words were mistranscribed. The intended phrase is “宜結不宜解，苦相思.”

revisions.text: 我諗你要認真啲學寫字。
revisions.note: “可寫字” is a transcription error for “學寫字.”

targets.text: 普相是，能賣都唔得能賣⋯

revisions.text: 苦相思，能賣都唔得能賣⋯
revisions.note: “普相是” is a transcription error; it should be “苦相思,” matching the Chinese subtitle and the intended phrase.

targets.text: 老爺，我會好好養大細龜的。
我們跟你在一起這麼久，蛋都沒生過
老爺自己甩著甩著而已
若然老爺不甩，一百幾天過都會生
不過老爺想撐一個就夠了
站在這裡幹什麼？還不走？

guides.text: 老爺，我會好好把小烏龜養大
我們跟你一起這麼久，蛋都沒有生過
若然老爺要的話，孩子多的是了
不過老爺有阿燦一個就夠了

revisions.text: 不過老爺有阿燦一個就夠了
revisions.note: The phrase appears to mis-transcribe the proper name 阿燦 as 「撐」. The corresponding Chinese subtitle confirms that the master is satisfied with having 阿燦 alone.
「樂成了」 is an apparent transcription error. The corresponding line is 「安樂了」, meaning that the master is now at ease.

targets.text: 怎麼樣？為甚麼他們被人抽架都這麼開心？別說了。
別說了，死不死死吧，死不死死⋯
兒子，你剛才有沒有留一張半張銀條扒身呢？
謝謝……，還不折磨我唱歌的那位。
不是，挺合得來，各花各眼！
就真的會做黑衣嗎？你以為？
以我這樣的人才、這樣的武藝
是耳仔，是耳公，我去買東西吃吧。

guides.text: 為甚麼他們給人家抄家還這樣開心？
孩兒，我們被抄家，我很想哭
孩兒，你剛才有沒有留點銀票傍身
完蛋了！我倆真是完蛋了
善有善報，可憐我這個小乞丐⋯
孩兒！你看這個像不像阿爹？
他比唱歌那個更沒良心
不是吧！多瀟灑，各人眼光不同吧
以前老叫你小乞丐！小乞丐
小乞丐老乞丐，拿去買東西吧

revisions.note: “抽架” is a transcription error for “抄家,” meaning the confiscation of a household’s property.

revisions.text: 仔，我哋俾人抄家，我好想喊。
revisions.note: The line is mistranscribed; it should convey that they were subjected to a household confiscation and that the speaker wants to cry.

revisions.text: 兒子，你啱啱有冇留低一張半張銀票傍身呢？
revisions.note: “銀條扒身” is a mishearing of “銀票傍身,” referring to keeping some banknotes on one’s person.
The original line is garbled and does not convey the repeated expression that they are finished.

revisions.text: 善有善報，可憐我呢個小乞丐⋯
revisions.note: “幸福” does not match the line’s meaning; the line refers to retribution and the speaker’s plight as a beggar.

revisions.text: 仔！你睇呢個似唔似阿爹？
revisions.note: The line is mistranscribed; it asks whether the person being pointed at resembles their father.
The line should identify the singing person as the one being referred to.
The line is mistranscribed; it says the person who gave money is worse than the singer.

revisions.text: 唔係呀，幾瀟灑，各花各眼！
revisions.note: The line should express that the person is dashing and that everyone has different tastes.
“黑耳仔” is a mistranscription of the term referring to a little beggar.

revisions.text: 而家就真係要做乞衣喇。
revisions.note: The line is incomplete; it means that they really have to become beggars now.
The line is mistranscribed; it expresses disbelief in this fate.
“黑衣” is a mishearing of “乞衣,” meaning beggar.

revisions.text: 就真係做乞衣咩？你以為呀？
revisions.note: “黑衣” should be “乞衣,” consistent with the reference meaning and the surrounding lines.

revisions.text: 以我呢種人才、呢種武藝，
revisions.note: “黑衣” should be “乞衣,” meaning beggar.
“黑衣” is a mishearing of “乞衣.”
The line asks which aspect of the speaker resembles a beggar; “黑衣” should be “乞衣.”
The reply should mean “不像,” rather than the vague “沒有.”

revisions.text: 乞兒仔、乞兒公，我去買嘢食啦。
revisions.note: “是耳仔，是耳公” is a garbled transcription of the repeated beggar terms in this exchange.

targets.text: 喂，你真係講證我哋黑衣呀？
吓，嚟晒喎！食飯先，食飯先。

revisions.text: 喂，你真係當正我哋乞衣呀？
revisions.note: “講證我哋黑衣” is a clear transcription error. The intended Cantonese phrase matching the meaning is “當正我哋乞衣”.
“瘟你個醬” contains clear character/transcription errors; the intended expression is “混你個帳呀”.

revisions.text: 吓，離晒譜喎！食飯先，食飯先。
revisions.note: “嚟晒喎” is a clear transcription error for the Cantonese expression “離晒譜喎”, meaning “太過分了”.

targets.text: 喂，阿燦啊，橫時食飯話冇嘢做。
唔啱阿爹，過嗰邊坐下，話唔定今晚嘅餐都有著落呢。
想要錢我唔使問人黑嘅
有冇一百幾十兩銀喺身？

guides.text: 讓我在那邊坐一會，說不定有晚飯吃

revisions.text: 喂，阿燦啊，橫掂食飯話冇嘢做。
revisions.note: “橫時” is an apparent transcription error; the Cantonese expression matching “反正” is “橫掂”.

revisions.text: 唔該阿爹，過嗰邊坐下，話唔定今晚嘅餐都有著落呢。
revisions.note: “唔啱阿爹” is not meaningful in this context and is most likely a mishearing of “唔該阿爹”.
“黑衣” is a transcription error for “乞衣”, meaning beggar.

revisions.text: 想要錢我唔使問人乞嘅
revisions.note: “問人黑” is a transcription error for “問人乞”, meaning to beg from others.
“唔黑” should be “唔乞”, consistent with the preceding reference to begging.
The subtitle omits “問人借”; the Chinese reference clearly indicates borrowing from someone.

targets.text: 你買這麼多東西，幹什麼？

revisions.note: “謝謝” should be the Cantonese expression “多謝,” matching the reference subtitle.
The wording is not an accurate Cantonese rendering of the question; “幹嘛” should be rendered as “做乜,” and “給” as “畀.”
“買這麼多東西” conflicts with the reference, which says the person is asking so many questions.
The sentence is garbled; it should convey “那總該知道吧.”
The current text reverses and repeats the meaning. The intended line is that one must give money whether one knows or not.
The line incorrectly changes the subject from asking questions to giving money; it should match the reference meaning.
The current wording does not accurately transcribe the statement that this behavior amounts to robbery.
“搶東西” is inconsistent with the reference and the following exchange, which identifies the person as a robber.
“黑而已，黑字” is a clear transcription error; the intended meaning is that they are beggars, not robbers.

revisions.text: 吓？你呢兩個臭東西想呃我！
revisions.note: The current wording is garbled and does not convey that the two people are trying to deceive the speaker.
The current line is garbled; it should mean “Don't take me for a fool; I'm very clever.”
“兩隻的” is a clear misrecognition of the duration “兩日喇.”
The current wording is garbled and does not convey the cold weather and empty stomachs in the reference.
The phrase should refer to having thought of a plan, not simply “想到計.”

revisions.text: 不如咁，我有個朋友嘅阿姨個妹。
revisions.note: The kinship description is mistranscribed; it should be “a friend's aunt's younger sister.”

revisions.text: 佢一早同我講好欣賞你
revisions.note: “一向” does not match the reference's “早就透露”; the intended Cantonese meaning is that she told him long ago that she admired the person.

revisions.text: 我諗佢會幫我哋個忙，先返廣州
revisions.note: The phrase “幫我們個忙回廣州” is garbled and omits the meaning that they should first return to Guangzhou.

revisions.text: 唔好講咁多！我哋去見佢。
revisions.note: “別說那麼多” should be rendered in Cantonese, and the final pronoun should be the neutral Cantonese “佢.”
The subject “我” is missing, and the wording should reflect that the arrangement was made long ago.

revisions.note: The wording is incomplete and uses non-Cantonese phrasing; this should identify the person wearing a red shirt under the lantern opposite.

guides.text: 這兩件衣服，一件給你，一件給阿燦
先把東西放下，先把東西放下
有就拿來！來⋯　　幹甚麼？
幹甚麼？過新年當然要利利是是
你就青春美麗　　謝謝
莫大叔，我們二老就兩免了
阿燦？他由年三十睡到大年初一
他剛剛才睡！別把他吵醒
對付趙無極一定要團結丐幫
我們要選出新幫主來主持大局
對付三位長老的蓮花落陣
莫大叔！蓮花落陣你也沒把握
以我現在打狗棒法的功力
怎麼可能打敗三位長老當上幫主呢？
這顆大還丹，你吃了之後會功力大增
不行！這顆大還丹是給你治內傷用的
想找人比武可以找我兒子
我兒子怎麼說也是一個武狀元
連當乞丐的資格都沒有

revisions.note: The character's name is transcribed incorrectly; it should be 如霜, consistent with the Chinese subtitle and later references.
The full form of the character's address is 莫大叔, matching the Chinese subtitle and the later dialogue.

revisions.text: 有一件衫畀你，一件送畀阿燦嘅。
revisions.note: “沙啤” is a clear transcription error. The dialogue refers to two pieces of clothing, so this should be 衫.
The line refers to asking for change, not asking whether someone is asleep.

revisions.text: 做咩？過新年梗係要利利是是。
revisions.note: This line is mistranscribed. It should ask what the speaker is doing and explain that New Year greetings involve giving lai see.
“新壯力健” is a clear mishearing of the New Year blessing 身體健康.
The phrase is incomplete in the original transcription; it should include the blessing 你就青春美麗.

revisions.text: 大叔，我哋二老就兩免喇。
revisions.note: “親家兩面好” is nonsensical here. The intended line is that the two elders can waive the exchange of gifts.

revisions.text: 阿燦？佢由年三十瞓到年初一。
revisions.note: “又年三十五” is a clear transcription error; the intended phrase is 由年三十.

revisions.text: 啱啱先瞓著！唔好嘈醒佢。
revisions.note: The line should say that he has only just fallen asleep, so they should not wake him.

revisions.text: 我整啲年糕畀大家食吖。
revisions.note: “蓮菇” is a mishearing of 年糕, the food being prepared for everyone.
“安手” is a clear transcription error; the reply means “I’ll help you.”
“新蒸豆” is a mishearing of 新年 in this context.
The current wording is garbled. The intended insult is 沒用的傢伙.
The character's name is transcribed incorrectly; it should be 如霜, consistent with the other references.

revisions.text: 對付三位長老嘅蓮花落陣，
revisions.note: “蓮花樂陣” is the wrong name for the martial technique; it should be 蓮花落陣.

revisions.text: 莫大叔！蓮花落陣你都冇把握。
revisions.note: The named technique is 蓮花落陣, not 蓮花樂陣.

revisions.text: 以我而家打狗棒法嘅功力，
revisions.note: The martial art is conventionally called 打狗棒法, not 打狗棍法.

revisions.text: 我又點可以打敗三位長老做幫主？
revisions.note: “帶下” is a clear mishearing of 打敗, and the line should refer to defeating the three elders and becoming chief.

revisions.text: 呢粒大還丹，你食咗之後會功力大增。
revisions.note: The pill's name is 大還丹, not 大環丹.

revisions.text: 唔得！呢粒大還丹係畀你醫內傷用嘅。
revisions.note: “醫理內傷” is a clear transcription error. The pill is for treating the listener's internal injury.
“不用閉嘴” reverses the meaning; the intended reassurance is 不用擔心.

revisions.text: 想搵人比武可以搵我個仔。
revisions.note: The line should say that if someone wants to find a person for a martial-arts contest, they can find the speaker's son.

revisions.text: 我個仔點講都係一個武狀元。
revisions.note: The original line is severely garbled. It should say that the son is, in any case, a martial arts champion.
“不是” does not match the continuation and is a mishearing of 現在, meaning “now.”
The correction should include the interjection 唔, matching the contrast between “now” and “formerly.”
“死蛇爛線” is a clear mishearing of 懶洋洋, describing his lethargic appearance.

targets.text: 阿燦，無論人家點樣睇你唔起都好
雖然而家你又冇咗武功
我而家已經冇晒力，亦都唔想再用力

guides.text: 阿燦，不管人家現在怎麼看不起你
我現在已經沒有力，也不想再用力

revisions.note: “打嘴過嚟” is an apparent transcription error; the context and Chinese subtitle indicate the intended phrase is “打拳過嚟,” meaning to punch me.

targets.text: 點算啦！唔好再浪費時間。
你不如畀我瞓下覺仲好

guides.text: 還是讓我多睡一會兒吧

revisions.note: 「點算啦」means “what should we do,” which conflicts with the Chinese subtitle 「算了」 (“forget it”). It should be 「算啦」.

targets.text: 就算真係要我練打狗棍
你都留返隻棍畀我得㗎，吓？
抱歉抱歉！拿，接住啦！嘿，嘿。

guides.text: 就算你要我練打狗棒法
你總該留個棒子給我吧

targets.text: 寫得咁醜樣，抹咗佢都啱嘅。

guides.text: 寫得這麼醜，把它擦掉也對
有沒有東西吃？　　沒有

revisions.note: The phrase is conventionally “苦海無涯,” meaning the sea of suffering has no shore. “無解” conflicts with the Chinese subtitle and appears to be a transcription error.
“阿姨” means auntie, while the corresponding Chinese subtitle indicates “乞丐” (beggar). This appears to be a mishearing or mistranscription.

targets.text: 喂，你噉嘅造型唔會黑食博同情呀，曬啲喎。
我以前去到度度都畀人睇得起
我成世人都未畀人睇起過嘅
喂喂，聽我講啊，唔好行住啊，聽我講啊
一個傻佬嘅班會，食飯飲酒，叫雞直落。
還返啲錢個我頂住當先
我就唔使喺度捱饅頭啦

guides.text: 這造型不去討飯博人家同情，真可惜
我以前到那裡都被人家看重
我一輩子沒被人瞧得起過
請我吃飯喝酒嫖妓過夜
我也不用在這兒捱饅頭

revisions.text: 喂，你噉嘅造型唔會乞食博同情呀，曬啲喎。
revisions.note: “黑食” is a transcription error; the intended Cantonese term matching “討飯” is “乞食”.
“黑衣” should be “乞衣”, the Cantonese term for a beggar.
“而今日” conflicts with the intended meaning “還不是落得這個下場”; “而家” means “now” and is the likely transcription.

revisions.text: 一個傻佬請我食飯飲酒，叫雞直落。
revisions.note: “班會” is a mis-transcription. The context and Chinese reference indicate “一個傻佬請我食飯飲酒，叫雞直落”.
The repeated “靚仔” conflicts with the reference meaning “臭小子”; “衰仔” is the corresponding Cantonese address.
“嗰嗰聲” is a malformed transcription; “嗱嗱聲” is the Cantonese expression meaning to hurry up, fitting the context.

revisions.text: 還返啲錢畀我頂住當先
revisions.note: “個我” is incorrect here; the intended recipient marker is “畀我”, meaning “give it back to me”.

targets.text: 不過你唔使驚，人哋有恩於我。
你都買唔返你冇咗嘅嘢
好話喇，載下洪逸臣，綽號老鬼臣。
乞衣之中，輩分至高，自好自老。
你講呀，你想要乜嘢？我成全你
所以你先搞成噉呢，後生仔
實不相瞞，我睇閣下從頭頂到腳趾尾。
都冇一分唔入細乞衣嘅型格
即係話閣下注定乞食乞咗一世啊

guides.text: 不過你不用怕，你有恩於我
也買不回你失去的東西
好說，在下洪日新，外號老鬼新
乞丐中輩份最高，字號最老

怎麼你覺得你不像人嗎？
所以你才會弄成這樣，年青人

沒有一個地方不露乞丐形格
即是說閣下注定討飯討一輩子

revisions.text: 不過你唔使驚，你有恩於我。
revisions.note: The pronoun is mistranscribed: the meaning is that the listener has done the speaker a favor, not that someone else has done so.
“心靈” is a transcription error; the intended phrase is “心領,” meaning acknowledgement or acceptance of thanks.
“專業” does not match the Chinese reference or context; the intended word is “尊嚴.”

revisions.text: 好說喇，在下洪日新，綽號老鬼新。
revisions.note: The name and nickname are mistranscribed. They should be 洪日新 and 老鬼新.

revisions.text: 乞衣之中，輩分至高，字號至老。
revisions.note: “自好自老” is a clear transcription error; the intended meaning is that he has the highest seniority and the oldest title or standing among beggars.

revisions.text: 都冇一分唔露乞衣嘅型格。
revisions.note: “唔入細乞衣” is nonsensical in context. The intended meaning is that every part of him reveals a beggar's character or appearance.

targets.text: 都係唔同你講住，我想瞓陣先。
嘅話，你會係乞衣中嘅霸主。

guides.text: 還是不跟你說，我想睡一會兒
乞丐中的霸主？那是甚麼？

revisions.note: “眾圓” is an obvious transcription error; the correct idiom is “行行出狀元.”

targets.text: 我唔理你係邊個，我唔想再同你講嘢。
請你併埋耳邊，唔好阻住我瞓覺。

guides.text: 我不管你是甚麼人，我不想再跟你說
請你讓開，不要礙著我睡覺

revisions.text: 請你行埋一邊，唔好阻住我瞓覺。
revisions.note: “併埋耳邊”唔符合語境，應為表示讓開、移到一邊嘅「行埋一邊」。
“家賊”明顯係聽錯字；按語境應為「唔係咩？」。
“咋吧”中嘅「吧」唔符合此處粵語表達，應為「咋嘛」，表示只係想同對方一齊。
“芝麻筋”係明顯聽錯或轉寫錯誤；按中文字幕及語境應為「神經病」。

targets.text: 後生仔，我哋夢中相見吓。

revisions.note: The subtitle appears to contain transcription errors: “康隆，復古嘻嘻” should be “降龍，伏虎,” matching the reference Chinese subtitle and the named arhats.

targets.text: 我就以洪七公第七代全人嘅身份

希望你好好利用，照招喇

醉回夢生法，傳授你睡夢羅漢拳

revisions.note: The name is 「蘇燦」, not 「蘇殘」.
「大徹大悟」 is the correct expression; 「大切大義」 is a transcription error.

revisions.text: 我就以洪七公第七代傳人嘅身份
revisions.note: 「傳人」 is the correct term for a successor or inheritor; 「全人」 is incorrect here.

revisions.text: 再以醉回夢生法，傳授你睡夢羅漢拳
revisions.note: The martial-arts technique is referred to as 「醉回夢生法」, not 「回夢心法」.

revisions.text: 希望你好好利用，接招喇
revisions.note: 「接招喇」 matches the intended meaning 「接招」; 「照招喇」 is a transcription error.
The Cantonese subtitle is missing 「甘」; it should read 「苦盡甘來」 to match the intended expression.

targets.text: 真空家鄉，無生老母，恃我神通

guides.text: 真空家鄉，無生老母，賜我神通

revisions.note: “江世” is a transcription error; the correct phrase is “降世,” meaning to descend into the world.

revisions.text: 真空家鄉，無生老母，賜我神通
revisions.note: “恃我神通” is incorrect in this context; it should be “賜我神通,” meaning to grant me supernatural powers.
“終生” is a transcription error; the intended phrase is “眾生,” meaning all living beings.

targets.text: 皇帝聽日會去成都受獵
我會用獻上美女嘅理由接近佢
元凌，你聽日可能要犧牲一下色相

榮華富貴絕對少不了你們

revisions.text: 皇帝聽日會去成都狩獵
revisions.note: “受獵” is a transcription error; it should be “狩獵,” meaning hunting.

revisions.text: 宛玲，你聽日可能要犧牲一下色相
revisions.note: The character’s name conflicts with the corresponding Chinese subtitle and should be “宛玲” rather than “元凌.”

targets.text: 點呀？冇人敢上嚟做幫主呀？
叫莫老三交返支打架棍出嚟，是。

guides.text: 怎麼？沒有人敢上來當幫主
叫莫老三把打狗棒交出來

revisions.text: 叫莫老三交返支打狗棒出嚟。
revisions.note: “打架棍” is a mishearing; the correct term corresponding to the weapon name is “打狗棒.” The trailing “是” is also extraneous and should be removed.

targets.text: 莫大叔同你姐姐到底去邊呀？
頭先見到莫大叔同姐姐講咗幾句話。

guides.text: 莫大叔跟你姐姐到底到哪處？
剛才我聽見莫大叔跟姐姐說了幾句話

revisions.note: “有腦” does not match the Chinese subtitle’s meaning of implying that the two people have an ambiguous relationship; it is likely a transcription error for “有路”.

targets.text: 怎麼樣？你沒事吧？　　姐姐呢？
我們要找個人上台算幫主先行

guides.text: 我們要找人上去選幫主

revisions.note: The phrase contains clear transcription errors: 「被」should be the Cantonese character 「畀」, and 「怕」should be 「呀」 in this context.
「招募擊」is a misrecognition of the character's name 「趙無極」, and 「捉了」should be rendered as the Cantonese 「捉咗」.

revisions.text: 我哋要搵個人上台選幫主先啦
revisions.note: 「算幫主先行」contains clear misheard characters; the intended meaning is to find someone to go up and choose the gang leader first.

targets.text: 既然你沒有好東西，我可以將就一下你！
不相干的，我這條命早就當沒了。

guides.text: 你不是九代弟子，快下來
既然你挑不出好的，我可以教育你！
沒相干，我的命早就當沒了

revisions.note: Corrected the non-Cantonese wording to the natural Cantonese equivalents indicated by the Chinese reference: “唔係” and “落嚟.”

revisions.text: 既然你揀唔出好嘅，我可以教訓吓你！
revisions.note: “冇好東西” does not match the reference meaning “挑不出好的”; corrected it to “揀唔出好嘅,” and rendered “教育你” as the Cantonese “教訓吓你.”
“玩了” is a mistranscription of “好玩”; corrected the sentence to match the reference meaning and Cantonese wording.
Corrected “一定沒命的” to the reference meaning “會沒命的,” and “下來” to the Cantonese phrasing “快啲落嚟.”

revisions.text: 冇相干，我條命一早當冇咗。
revisions.note: Corrected the non-Cantonese wording and restored the Cantonese phrasing corresponding to “沒相干，我的命早就當沒了.”
Corrected the non-Cantonese pronoun and verb to Cantonese: “扔他” becomes “掉佢.” The extra “對了” is omitted because it is not present in the corresponding reference subtitle.
「睡夢來看拳」應為「睡夢羅漢拳」，與中文字幕及招式名稱一致。
「報陳」係明顯聽寫錯誤，應為「佈陣」。
“打狗棍”應為“打狗棒”，與中文字幕中的名稱一致；其餘內容不作修改。

targets.text: 呀呀，真係話我唔會打狗棍？

revisions.note: “棍唔棍” is an apparent transcription error; it should be “棍棍” to match the repeated-word structure and meaning.
“唔知” conflicts with the intended meaning “不像” and is likely a mishearing of “唔似”. The martial-art name is also standardized as “打狗棒法” for consistency.

targets.text: 我哋嘅珍寶之母！我哋殺咗佢。

guides.text: 他打斷我們鎮幫之寶！我們殺了他

revisions.text: 我哋嘅鎮幫之寶！我哋殺咗佢。
revisions.note: “珍寶之母” is an apparent mistranscription. In context, it should be “鎮幫之寶,” matching the Chinese subtitle and the intended meaning.

targets.text: 任何弟子破到蓮花樂陣
蓋邦之所以成為天下第一大幫

你們不僅要選他做幫主
來愛護他！關懷他！多點請他喝茶
最多保佑蓋邦生意興隆！千秋萬世
令我信其有，不可信其無，嘿。
了，這樣都過得了，我果然是天才！

guides.text: 任何弟子破了蓮花落陣
丐幫之所以成為天下第一大幫
我洪某當年留下打狗棒
目的只是留給大家作為留念
棒的本身並不代表甚麼
但是你這些蠢蛋居然當寶
還為了爭奪它弄到丐幫四分五裂

這個年輕人！雖然資歷低
但是天才橫溢！聰明絕頂

誰要對付他就是對付我
你們不只要選他當幫主
來愛護他！關懷他！常常請他喝茶
